overview.description: AI-powered credit report analysis platform with OCR-based tradeline extraction, dispute letter generation, and comprehensive credit score tracking. Created by a former credit repair specialist to automate FCRA-compliant credit dispute workflows.

key_components.name: App.tsx
key_components.description: Frontend entry point handling client-side routing, global providers (Auth, Query), and layout structure

key_components.name: FastAPI Backend
key_components.description: Backend entry point configuring middleware, CORS, routers, and server settings for credit report processing with Google Document AI and Gemini fallback

key_components.name: Multi-Level Cache
key_components.description: Hybrid caching mechanism combining Redis (distributed) and In-Memory (local) storage with fallback logic for tradeline data

key_components.name: Tradeline Extraction Pipeline
key_components.description: Core OCR and AI-powered tradeline parsing pipeline using Google Document AI and LLM-based extraction with confidence scoring and validation

key_components.name: Multi-Layer Extractor
key_components.description: Advanced multi-layer tradeline extraction system with bureau-specific parsing, AI validation, and error correction for Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion formats

key_components.name: Auth Provider
key_components.description: Context provider managing user authentication state and session persistence with Supabase JWT validation

key_components.name: Credit Dashboard
key_components.description: Main dashboard component set displaying credit score, tradelines, and dispute tracking interface

key_components.name: Enhanced PDF Processor
key_components.description: Enhanced PDF processing service integrating OCR, text extraction, and AI-based tradeline parsing with pdfplumber and PyMuPDF

key_components.name: Dispute Generator
key_components.description: Wizard-based UI for generating FCRA-compliant dispute letters with AI-powered content generation

key_components.name: Supabase Integration
key_components.description: Supabase client configuration and database access layer for PostgreSQL storage and Supabase Auth

features.title: Implementation Plan: Product Requirements Document (PRD) for Credit Clarity Platform
